evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: A structured, quality-focused mindset and genuine interest in standards and data governance topics.
evidence.domain_risk: our reporting platform is one of the key channels we use to bring data to life for the business
evidence.data_team_maturity: Support the ongoing modernization of the BI stack, including evaluating and testing alternative analytics and visualization tools.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, develop, and deploy reports and dashboards powered by our Data Warehouse.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Support documentation and governance efforts to improve maintainability and trust in reporting assets
evidence.autonomy_level: Improve consistency and usability of reports through establishing shared standards, templates, and best practices
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Support the ongoing modernization of the BI stack, including evaluating and testing alternative analytics and visualization tools.
evidence.work_arrangement: Workplace Type: Hybrid (Work from abroad up to 30 calendar days per year)

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: A structured, quality-focused mindset and genuine interest in standards and data governance topics.
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple quality, governance, standards, and documentation signals with no velocity language.
domain_risk_quote: our reporting platform is one of the key channels we use to bring data to life for the business
domain_risk_reasoning: Language indicates internal business intelligence and reporting without explicit financial reporting, regulatory compliance, or audit signals, suggesting moderate risk where errors affect decisions but lack immediate regulatory consequences.
data_team_maturity_quote: Support the ongoing modernization of the BI stack, including evaluating and testing alternative analytics and visualization tools.
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Existing Power BI platform with modernization efforts indicates mid-stage team, not greenfield nor large established function.
jd_authorship_quote: Design, develop, and deploy reports and dashboards powered by our Data Warehouse.
jd_authorship_reasoning: Mix of technically specific responsibilities (Power BI, SQL, data modeling, Snowflake/Redshift, architecture) alongside generic governance and support language.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Support documentation and governance efforts to improve maintainability and trust in reporting assets
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role primarily serves the data/analytics platform and its internal consumers through governance, standardization, and platform modernization rather than commercial, product, or finance stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: Improve consistency and usability of reports through establishing shared standards, templates, and best practices
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role combines strategic ownership of platform governance and standards (establishing) with execution of reporting deliverables (designing, deploying).
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Support the ongoing modernization of the BI stack, including evaluating and testing alternative analytics and visualization tools.
ai_role_quote: Design, develop, and deploy reports and dashboards powered by our Data Warehouse.
ai_role_reasoning: No mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-ready infrastructure.
testing_framing_quote: A structured, quality-focused mindset and genuine interest in standards and data governance topics.
testing_framing_reasoning: Quality is framed as a mindset and interest rather than owned responsibility for testing, data contracts, or quality assurance.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Support documentation and governance efforts to improve maintainability and trust in reporting assets.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Emphasis on trust, governance, and maintainability signals operational reliability concerns without explicit compliance or regulatory framing.
